name: splunk_admin
description: Splunk administration skill for analyzing saved searches, validating configuration files, auditing indexes, and checking props.conf settings.
author: ObsAI Team

splunk_config_root.description: Root path for Splunk configuration files

actions.name: analyze_saved_searches
actions.description: Analyze saved searches for performance issues, wildcard index usage, scheduling conflicts, and best-practice violations. Optionally filter by index.

index_filter.description: Optional index name to filter saved searches by

actions.name: check_config_health
actions.description: Validate Splunk configuration files for best practices, deprecated settings, and common misconfigurations. Optionally scope to a specific app.

app_name.description: Optional Splunk app name to limit the check to

actions.name: audit_indexes
actions.description: List Splunk indexes with size statistics, retention settings, and usage metrics. Optionally filter by minimum size.

min_size_mb.description: Minimum index size in MB to include in results

actions.name: validate_props
actions.description: Validate props.conf settings for correctness, including TRANSFORMS references, TIME_FORMAT patterns, and field extraction configurations. Optionally filter by sourcetype.
